research_notes.text: {geni:about_me} From Miguel's autobiography: "My granny Malka, I knew well. She lived for several years at our house, which was hers before, and I liked her a lot. She used to make wool gloves and socks for all her grandchildren to wear in the winter. We competed for our turn, extending our hands and shouting: ‘for me, for me’, whenever she was taking measurements."
